description: Failing a Critical question indicates a fundamental problem that severely limits the dataset's suitability for AI/ML use.
Important questions represent best practices affecting reproducibility, interoperability, or usability.
Optional questions capture desirable but non-essential characteristics.

points: May have serious issues. Fails one or more Critical criteria.
Passes most Critical questions (at least 7 out of 8).
Passes all Critical questions plus at least 50% of Important questions.
Passes all Critical and Important questions plus at least 50% of Optional questions.
